Description: Verify that navigating to the application URL returns a rendered page without errors.
Test Steps: 1. Open browser. 2. Navigate to https://example.com/. 3. Wait for page to load.
Expected outcome: Page loads with HTTP 200; no browser error page is shown; page content is visible.

Description: Verify the browser/document title matches the design specification.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Read document.title.
Expected outcome: document.title === 'Example Domain'

Description: Verify the main heading on Screen 1 matches the design exactly.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Locate the <h1> element. 3. Read its text content.
Expected outcome: h1 text content === 'Example Domain'

Description: Verify the body paragraph on Screen 1 contains the exact text from the design, describing domain use.
Data: Expected text: 'This domain is for use in illustrative examples in documents. You may use this domain in literature without prior coordination or asking for permission.'
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Locate the first visible

element. 3. Read its text content.
Expected outcome:
First

contains 'This domain is for use in illustrative examples in documents. You may use this domain in literature without prior coordination or asking for permission.'

Test Case/Summary: Navigation link is present and labeled correctly
Description: Verify a link with text 'More information...' exists on Screen 1.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Locate an <a> element with text matching 'More information...'. 3. Verify it is visible.
Expected outcome: An <a> element with visible text 'More information...' is present on the page.

Test Case/Summary: Clicking 'More information...' navigates to IANA page
Description: Verify that clicking the link on Screen 1 navigates the user to a different page (Screen 2) as defined in the flow.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Click the link with text 'More information...'. 3. Wait for page load. 4. Read page URL.
Expected outcome: URL after navigation is NOT https://example.com/ — it has changed to the IANA Reserved Domains page (different domain/path).

Description: Verify the main heading on Screen 2 (after navigation) matches the design exactly.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Click 'More information...'. 3. Wait for page load. 4. Locate the main heading (h1 or h2). 5. Read its text.
Expected outcome: The page contains a heading with text 'IANA-managed Reserved Domains'.

Description: Verify the 'Example Domains' section heading is present on Screen 2 as shown in the design.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Click 'More information...'. 3. Wait for page load. 4. Locate heading containing 'Example Domains'.
Expected outcome: A heading or section label with text 'Example Domains' is visible on the page.

Description: Verify the 'Test Domains' section heading is present on Screen 2 as shown in the design.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Click 'More information...'. 3. Wait for page load. 4. Locate heading containing 'Test Domains'.
Expected outcome: A heading or section label with text 'Test Domains' is visible on the page.

Description: Validate that the live app's h1 text matches the design image exactly. Any deviation is a defect.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Capture h1 text. 3. Compare to design value.
Expected outcome: Live h1 text === 'Example Domain'. Deviation = defect.

Description: Validate that the live app's first paragraph text matches the design image exactly.
Data: Design: 'This domain is for use in illustrative examples in documents. You may use this domain in literature without prior coordination or asking for permission.'
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Capture first

text. 3. Compare to design value.
Expected outcome: Live paragraph text matches design exactly. Deviation = defect.

Description: Validate that the visible link on Screen 1 is labeled 'More information...' as shown in the design.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Locate <a> element. 3. Read visible text. 4. Compare to design.
Expected outcome: Link text === 'More information...'. Deviation = defect.

Description: Validate that the browser title of Screen 1 matches the design.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Read document.title. 3. Compare to design.
Expected outcome: document.title === 'Example Domain'. Deviation = defect.

Description: Validate that the page background is white as shown in the design.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Compute background-color of <body>. 3. Compare to design.
Expected outcome: body background-color is white / rgb(255 255 255) or near-white. Deviation = defect.

Test Case/Summary: No navigation header — Screen 1 design parity
Description: Validate that no navigation bar or site header element is present on Screen 1 as per the design (minimal layout with no nav).
Data: Design: no <nav> or header bar present
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Count <nav> elements. 3. Verify absence.
Expected outcome: <nav> element count === 0 (no visible navigation header). Presence of a nav = defect.

Description: Validate that the main heading on Screen 2 is 'IANA-managed Reserved Domains' as shown in the design.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Click 'More information...'. 3. Wait for load. 4. Locate first h1/h2. 5. Compare to design.
Expected outcome: Heading text === 'IANA-managed Reserved Domains'. Deviation = defect.

Test Case/Summary: Example Domains section — Screen 2 design parity
Description: Validate that a section labeled 'Example Domains' is present on Screen 2 as shown in the design.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Click 'More information...'. 3. Wait for load. 4. Locate heading/text 'Example Domains'. 5. Verify visible.
Expected outcome: 'Example Domains' heading is visible on the page. Absence = defect.

Test Case/Summary: Test Domains section — Screen 2 design parity
Description: Validate that a section labeled 'Test Domains' is present on Screen 2 as shown in the design.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Click 'More information...'. 3. Wait for load. 4. Locate heading/text 'Test Domains'. 5. Verify visible.
Expected outcome: 'Test Domains' heading is visible on the page. Absence = defect.

Description: Validate that IANA branding or a site header is present on Screen 2 as shown in the design.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Click 'More information...'. 3. Wait for load. 4. Check for IANA logo or header element.
Expected outcome: IANA branded header (logo, nav, or title containing 'IANA') is present. Absence = defect.

Test Case/Summary: URL changed after navigation — Screen 2 design parity
Description: Validate that after clicking the link the URL is no longer example.com — confirming navigation to a different page.
Test Steps: 1. Navigate to https://example.com/. 2. Click 'More information...'. 3. Wait for load. 4. Read page.url().
Expected outcome: page.url() does NOT equal https://example.com/ — navigation succeeded. Staying on example.com = defect.
